subtasks.title: Create Destination domain models
subtasks.description: Define core domain entities for destinations including safety ratings, solo suitability scores, and metadata
subtasks.notes: Created Destination model with all required properties including safety scores, solo suitability factors, helper models (SoloSuitabilityFactors, SafetyInsight, Activity), and enums (BudgetLevel, ActivityLevel). Note: build_runner needs to be run to generate .freezed.dart and .g.dart files.
acceptance_criteria: Destination model with id, name, description, location (lat/lng)
Safety score (1-10) and safety insights list
Solo suitability score (1-10) with factors (nightlife, walkability, etc.)
Budget level (budget, moderate, expensive)
Activity level options (relaxed, moderate, adventurous)
Tags/categories (beach, mountain, urban, cultural, etc.)
Images list with URLs
Popular activities list
Best time to visit
Freezed models with proper equality
JSON serialization

subtasks.title: Create DestinationFilter model
subtasks.description: Define filter options for destination search including budget, safety, activity level, and solo-friendliness
subtasks.notes: Created DestinationFilter model with all required filters (budget, safety, solo suitability, activity level, location, tags, search query). Added DestinationSortOrder enum with 7 sort options (popularity, safety, soloSuitability, budgetAsc, budgetDesc, newest, relevance). Included pagination support (offset, limit) and helper methods (isDefault, hasActiveFilters, resetPagination, defaultFilter). Uses Freezed for immutability with JSON serialization. Note: build_runner needs to be run to generate .freezed.dart and .g.dart files.
acceptance_criteria: Budget range filter - Implemented with BudgetLevel enum
Minimum safety score filter - Implemented (1-10 range)
Activity level filter - Implemented with ActivityLevel enum
Solo suitability score filter - Implemented (1-10 range)
Location/region filter - Implemented (countryCode, region)
Tags/categories multi-select - Implemented (List<String>)
Text search query - Implemented (searchQuery field)
Freezed model with JSON serialization - Implemented with @freezed annotation

subtasks.title: Create PersonalizedRecommendation model
subtasks.description: Define model for AI-generated personalized recommendations based on user preferences
subtasks.notes: Created PersonalizedRecommendation model with RecommendationSource enum and RecommendedDestination helper class. Includes match scores (0-1), recommendation reasons, matching factors, and support for multiple recommendation sources (userPreferences, pastTrips, similarUsers, trending, curated, aiGenerated). Added helper methods (isExpired, isValid, highMatchRecommendations, hiddenGemRecommendations, sortedByMatchScore). Uses Freezed with proper JSON serialization. Note: build_runner needs to be run to generate .freezed.dart and .g.dart files.
acceptance_criteria: Recommended destinations list - Implemented as List<RecommendedDestination>
Match score/relevance percentage - Implemented as double matchScore (0-1)
Reason for recommendation - Implemented as String reason field
Based on user preferences or past trips - Implemented via RecommendationSource enum
Freezed model with JSON serialization - Fully implemented

subtasks.title: Create SavedDestination model
subtasks.description: Define model for destinations saved to wishlist or trips
subtasks.notes: Created SavedDestination model with SaveType enum (wishlist, trip). Includes destination reference, userId, saveType, optional tripId (for trip saves), optional notes field for user annotations, and createdAt/updatedAt timestamps. Added helper methods: isWishlist, isTrip, hasNotes, withUpdatedTimestamp, and withNotes. Uses Freezed for immutability with JSON serialization. Note: build_runner needs to be run to generate .freezed.dart and .g.dart files.
acceptance_criteria: Destination reference - Implemented as required Destination field
Save type (wishlist, trip_id) - Implemented with SaveType enum
Notes field - Implemented as optional String field
Created at timestamp - Implemented with createdAt and updatedAt fields
Freezed model with JSON serialization - Fully implemented

subtasks.title: Create CuratedList model
subtasks.description: Define model for curated destination collections (popular solo destinations, hidden gems, etc.)
subtasks.notes: Created CuratedList model with CuratedListType enum (12 types: popularSolo, hiddenGems, budgetFriendly, adventure, cultural, beach, urban, nature, food, wellness, seasonal, custom). Includes comprehensive properties: id, name, description, type, destinations list, coverImageUrl, images gallery, curator info, metadata (viewCount, saveCount, isFeatured), pre-calculated scores for filtering, and tags. Added 15+ helper methods including: hasCoverImage, hasDestinations, destinationCountLabel, previewDestinations, typeLabel, isHiddenGemsList, isBudgetFriendly, isPopular, withIncrementedViewCount, withIncrementedSaveCount, withUpdatedTimestamp, hasSafetyScores, hasSoloSuitabilityScores, matchesTag. Uses Freezed for immutability with proper JSON serialization. Note: build_runner needs to be run to generate .freezed.dart and .g.dart files.
acceptance_criteria: List id, name, description - Implemented
List type (popular_solo, hidden_gems, budget_friendly, etc.) - Implemented with CuratedListType enum (12 types)
Destinations list - Implemented as required List<Destination> field
Cover image - Implemented as coverImageUrl field with optional String
Freezed model with JSON serialization - Fully implemented

subtasks.title: Create DestinationRepository interface
subtasks.description: Define repository contract for destination data operations
subtasks.notes: Created DestinationRepository abstract class with 8 methods defining the complete contract for destination data operations. All methods documented with comprehensive doc comments explaining parameters, return types, and exceptions. Methods include: searchDestinations (with filter support), getDestinationById, getPersonalizedRecommendations, getCuratedLists, getCuratedListById, saveDestination, unsaveDestination (with optional saveType filter), and getSavedDestinations (with optional saveType filter). All return types use domain models (Destination, CuratedList, PersonalizedRecommendation, SavedDestination). Follows Clean Architecture principles and matches existing repository patterns in the codebase (auth, profile, travel).
acceptance_criteria: searchDestinations(DestinationFilter filter) method
getDestinationById(String id) method
getPersonalizedRecommendations(String userId) method
getCuratedLists() method
getCuratedListById(String id) method
saveDestination(SavedDestination saved) method
unsaveDestination(String destinationId) method
getSavedDestinations(String userId) method
Return types use domain models

subtasks.title: Implement DestinationRepository with GraphQL
subtasks.description: Create repository implementation using GraphQL API for destination data
subtasks.notes: Created DestinationRepositoryImpl with GraphQL client integration. Implemented all 8 methods from DestinationRepository interface: searchDestinations (with comprehensive filter support via _buildFilterVariables), getDestinationById, getPersonalizedRecommendations, getCuratedLists, getCuratedListById, saveDestination (mutation), unsaveDestination (mutation), and getSavedDestinations. Added comprehensive error handling with _handleGraphQLException method that maps GraphQL exceptions to appropriate AppException types (NetworkTimeoutException, NetworkConnectivityException, BadRequestException, UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenException, NotFoundException, ValidationException, ServerException). Includes helper methods for enum conversion: _budgetLevelToString, _activityLevelToString, _sortOrderToString, and _saveTypeToString. All queries use FetchPolicy.networkOnly to ensure fresh data. Follows existing code patterns from auth and profile features with proper const constructor and dependency injection.
acceptance_criteria: Implements DestinationRepository interface - COMPLETED
Uses GraphQL client for API calls - COMPLETED
Proper error handling and exceptions - COMPLETED
Maps API responses to domain models - COMPLETED
Search query with filter parameters - COMPLETED
Recommendations query - COMPLETED
Curated lists queries - COMPLETED
Save/unsave mutations - COMPLETED

subtasks.title: Create GraphQL queries and mutations
subtasks.description: Define GraphQL documents for destination operations
subtasks.notes: Created DestinationQueries class with all GraphQL documents for destination discovery feature. Includes 8 GraphQL operations: 1) SearchDestinations query with comprehensive filter parameters (searchQuery, budgetLevel, minSafetyScore, minSoloSuitabilityScore, activityLevel, countryCode, region, tags, hiddenGemsOnly, minPopularityScore, maxDailyCost, sortBy, offset, limit) returning full destination objects with nested safetyInsights, soloSuitabilityFactors, and popularActivities, 2) GetDestinationById query for single destination retrieval, 3) GetPersonalizedRecommendations query returning recommendations with nested destinations, match scores, reasons, and matching factors, 4) GetCuratedLists query returning all curated lists with full destination details, 5) GetCuratedListById query for specific curated list, 6) SaveDestination mutation with userId, destinationId, saveType, optional tripId and notes, 7) UnsaveDestination mutation with destinationId, userId, and optional saveType filter, 8) GetSavedDestinations query with userId and optional saveType filter. All queries include proper GraphQL type definitions and complete field selections matching domain model structure.
acceptance_criteria: Search destinations query with filters - COMPLETED
Get destination by ID query - COMPLETED
Get personalized recommendations query - COMPLETED
Get curated lists query - COMPLETED
Get curated list by ID query - COMPLETED
Save destination mutation - COMPLETED
Unsave destination mutation - COMPLETED
Get saved destinations query - COMPLETED

subtasks.title: Create data transfer objects (DTOs)
subtasks.description: Create DTOs for API request/response mapping if needed
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive DTOs for all domain models: DestinationDto, SavedDestinationDto, CuratedListDto, and PersonalizedRecommendationDto. Each DTO includes: 1) Explicit fromJson factory constructors for GraphQL API response parsing, 2) toDomain() methods for conversion to domain models with null safety handling and sensible defaults, 3) Enum parsing methods for type conversions (BudgetLevel, ActivityLevel, SaveType, CuratedListType, RecommendationSource), 4) Static helper methods for list operations (fromJsonList, toDomainList), 5) Support for complex nested objects and maps. Added barrel file (dtos.dart) for clean imports. Provides clear separation between infrastructure and domain layers, enables easier testing, and allows for future API contract changes without affecting domain models.
acceptance_criteria: Destination DTO with from/to domain model mapping - COMPLETED
Proper JSON serialization - COMPLETED
Handles null values appropriately - COMPLETED

subtasks.title: Create DestinationSearchProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing destination search state and operations
subtasks.notes: Implemented DestinationSearchProvider with comprehensive state management. Created DestinationSearchState class with results, filter, pagination tracking (hasMore, currentOffset, totalCount), and metadata. Implemented DestinationSearchNotifier extending StateNotifier with full Riverpod AsyncValue pattern support. Methods include: search(filter) with pagination reset option, loadMore() for incremental pagination, refresh() for pull-to-refresh, clear() to reset state, updateFilter() and resetFilter() for filter management, and searchQuery() convenience method. Added destinationRepositoryProvider for dependency injection. All error handling uses AsyncValue.error pattern. Follows existing patterns from auth and travel features.
acceptance_criteria: State for search results, loading, error - COMPLETED (AsyncValue<DestinationSearchState>)
Search method with filter parameters - COMPLETED (search method with full filter support)
Load more/pagination support - COMPLETED (loadMore method with offset/limit pagination)
Clear search method - COMPLETED (clear method resets to initial state)
Error handling state - COMPLETED (AsyncValue.error in catch blocks)
Notifier implementation - COMPLETED (StateNotifier with comprehensive methods)

subtasks.title: Create DestinationDetailProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing single destination detail state
subtasks.notes: Implemented DestinationDetailProvider with comprehensive state management. Created DestinationDetailState class with destination data and related destinations support. Implemented DestinationDetailNotifier extending StateNotifier with AsyncValue pattern. Features include: loadDestination() with auto-load on creation, refresh() for pull-to-refresh, loadRelatedDestinations() with smart filtering (country, region, tags, budget, activity), loadRelatedDestinationsWithFilter() for custom criteria, and clear() method. Uses StateNotifierProvider.autoDispose.family pattern for parameterized providers. Limits related destinations to 5 items and excludes current destination from suggestions. Follows existing patterns from DestinationSearchProvider with full documentation and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: State for destination data, loading, error - COMPLETED (AsyncValue<DestinationDetailState>)
Load destination by ID method - COMPLETED (loadDestination() method)
Related destinations suggestions - COMPLETED (loadRelatedDestinations() and loadRelatedDestinationsWithFilter() methods)
Error handling - COMPLETED (comprehensive try-catch blocks with AsyncValue.error)
Notifier implementation - COMPLETED (DestinationDetailNotifier extends StateNotifier)

subtasks.title: Create RecommendationProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing personalized recommendations
subtasks.notes: Implemented RecommendationProvider with comprehensive state management. Created RecommendationState class with recommendation data and helper methods (isExpired, isValid, highMatchRecommendations, hiddenGemRecommendations, sortedByMatchScore). Implemented RecommendationNotifier extending StateNotifier with AsyncValue pattern. Features include: loadRecommendations() with auto-load on creation, refresh() for pull-to-refresh, refreshIfExpired() for optimization, clear() method, and convenience getters (highMatchRecommendations, hiddenGemRecommendations, sortedRecommendations, isExpired, isValid, summary, source, totalCount). Uses StateNotifierProvider.autoDispose.family pattern for user-specific providers. Includes comprehensive documentation with usage examples. Follows existing patterns from DestinationSearchProvider and DestinationDetailProvider with full error handling.

Notifier implementation - COMPLETED (RecommendationNotifier extends StateNotifier)

subtasks.title: Create CuratedListsProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing curated destination lists
subtasks.notes: Implemented CuratedListsProvider with comprehensive state management. Created CuratedListsState class with curatedLists array, selectedList for detail view, and helper methods (featuredLists, popularLists, getListsByType, hiddenGemsLists, budgetFriendlyLists, popularSoloLists). Implemented CuratedListsNotifier extending StateNotifier with AsyncValue pattern. Features include: loadCuratedLists() with auto-load on creation, loadCuratedList(listId) for specific list with smart array update, refresh() for all lists, refreshSelectedList() for current selection, clear() and clearSelectedList() for cleanup, and convenience getters (featuredLists, popularLists, getListsByType, hiddenGemsLists, budgetFriendlyLists, popularSoloLists, totalCount, hasCuratedLists, hasSelectedList, selectedList). Uses StateNotifierProvider pattern for global state. Includes comprehensive documentation with usage examples. Follows existing patterns from DestinationSearchProvider, DestinationDetailProvider, and RecommendationProvider with full error handling.

subtasks.title: Create SavedDestinationsProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing saved destinations (wishlist and trips)
subtasks.notes: Implemented SavedDestinationsProvider with comprehensive state management. Created SavedDestinationsState class with helper methods (isDestinationSaved, isDestinationInWishlist, isDestinationInTrip, getSavedDestination, wishlistItems, tripItems, groupedByTrip). Implemented SavedDestinationsNotifier extending StateNotifier with AsyncValue pattern. Features include: loadSavedDestinations() with auto-load on creation, saveDestination() for wishlist/trip with optional notes and tripId, unsaveDestination() with optional saveType filter, updateNotes() for modifying notes, refresh(), clear(), and multiple convenience getters (wishlistItems, tripItems, totalCount, wishlistCount, tripCount, groupedByTrip). Uses StateNotifierProvider.autoDispose.family pattern for user-specific providers. Comprehensive error handling with AsyncValue.error in all methods. Full documentation with usage examples. Follows existing patterns from DestinationSearchProvider, DestinationDetailProvider, RecommendationProvider, and CuratedListsProvider.

subtasks.title: Create FilterProvider
subtasks.description: Riverpod provider for managing destination search filter state
subtasks.notes: Implemented FilterProvider with comprehensive filter state management. Created FilterNotifier extending StateNotifier with DestinationFilter state. Features include: updateFilter() for complete filter updates, individual update methods for all filter fields (updateSearchQuery, updateBudgetLevel, updateMinSafetyScore, updateMinSoloSuitabilityScore, updateActivityLevel, updateLocation, updateCountryCode, updateRegion, updateTags), tag management methods (addTag, removeTag, toggleTag), boolean filter methods (updateHiddenGemsOnly, toggleHiddenGemsOnly), score and cost filters (updateMinPopularityScore, updateMaxDailyCost), sort order management (updateSortOrder), reset methods (reset, resetSoftFilters, resetPagination), and 12 helper getters for accessing filter state (hasActiveFilters, hasOnlySoftFilters, searchQuery, budgetLevel, minSafetyScore, minSoloSuitabilityScore, activityLevel, countryCode, region, tags, hiddenGemsOnly, minPopularityScore, maxDailyCost, sortOrder, activeFilterCount). Uses StateNotifierProvider pattern for global filter state. Comprehensive documentation with usage examples. Follows existing patterns from other providers in the feature.
acceptance_criteria: State for active DestinationFilter - COMPLETED (StateNotifierProvider with DestinationFilter state)
Update filter methods - COMPLETED (updateFilter and 10+ individual update methods)
Reset filter method - COMPLETED (reset, resetSoftFilters, resetPagination methods)
Notifier implementation - COMPLETED (FilterNotifier extends StateNotifier)

subtasks.title: Create DestinationCard widget
subtasks.description: Reusable card component for displaying destination preview
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive DestinationCard widget with all required features. Implementation includes: 1) Image display with CachedNetworkImage and proper placeholder/error handling, 2) Destination name and truncated description (2 lines max), 3) Safety score badge with color-coded display (green ≥8, orange ≥6, red <6) and appropriate icons (security/warning/dangerous), 4) Solo suitability badge with person icon and color coding based on theme colors, 5) Budget level indicator with icons (attach_money for budget, money for moderate, trending_up for luxury) and optional daily cost display, 6) Location indicator showing country code with location icon, 7) Tap callback support via onTap parameter, 8) Bookmark/save button with visual state (filled/border icon) and onBookmarkTap callback, 9) Responsive layout with proper constraints and flexible widgets. Added hidden gem badge overlay, customizable border radius and elevation, optional trailing widget, and comprehensive documentation. Uses pattern from ProfileAvatar and ProfileActions widgets. Created widgets barrel file for clean imports.

subtasks.title: Create SafetyScoreBadge widget
subtasks.description: Widget to display safety score with visual indicators
subtasks.notes: Created SafetyScoreBadge widget with comprehensive functionality. Features include: 1) Score display (1-10 scale) with precise formatting (1 decimal place), 2) Dynamic color coding (green ≥8 for high safety, orange ≥6 for medium, red <6 for low), 3) Context-aware icons (Icons.security for high, Icons.warning_amber for medium, Icons.dangerous for low), 4) Optional label parameter with default 'Safety' text, 5) Full accessibility support via Semantics widget with descriptive labels ('Safety score: X.X out of 10, high/medium/low safety'), 6) Customizable styling (padding, borderRadius, iconSize), 7) Reusable const constructor pattern. Integrated with DestinationCard widget (replaced inline implementation). Added to widgets barrel file for clean imports. Follows existing code patterns from ProfileAvatar and ProfileActions widgets.

subtasks.title: Create FilterChips widget
subtasks.description: Filter chips for quick filtering by category
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive FilterChips widget with all required features. Implementation includes: 1) Horizontal scrollable ListView with configurable height and padding, 2) Budget level chips (Budget, Moderate, Luxury) with icons (attach_money, money, trending_up), 3) Activity level chips (Relaxed, Moderate, Adventurous) with icons (self_improvement, directions_walk, hiking), 4) Hidden gems chip with diamond icon and special amber color theming, 5) Custom tags support for additional categories, 6) 'Clear All' chip shown conditionally when filters are active with errorContainer styling, 7) Selected state styling with FilterChip widget using theme colors (primaryContainer, secondaryContainer), 8) On selection callback support via onFilterChanged parameter, 9) Toggle functionality (clicking selected chip deselects it), 10) Accessibility support via Semantics widgets with labels and hints, 11) Configurable visibility for each chip category (showBudgetChips, showActivityChips, showHiddenGemsChip), 12) Flexible customization (padding, chipSpacing, height). Private helper classes (_BudgetChip, _ActivityChip, _HiddenGemChip, _TagChip, _ClearAllChip) encapsulate chip-specific logic. Integrates with FilterProvider for state management. Updated widgets barrel file to export FilterChips. Follows existing patterns from SafetyScoreBadge and DestinationCard widgets.

subtasks.title: Create DestinationDiscoveryScreen
subtasks.description: Main screen for destination discovery with search and filters
subtasks.notes: Implemented comprehensive DestinationDiscoveryScreen with all required features. Created ConsumerStatefulWidget with proper lifecycle management. Features include: 1) Search bar with debounced text input (500ms) and clear button, 2) Horizontal scrollable FilterChips widget integration, 3) GridView with 2-column layout for destination cards, 4) Pull-to-refresh using RefreshIndicator, 5) Infinite scroll pagination triggering at 80% scroll with loading indicator, 6) Empty state with icon, message, and 'Clear All Filters' button, 7) Loading state with CircularProgressIndicator, 8) Error state with error message and 'Try Again' button, 9) Advanced filter button in AppBar (placeholder for FilterModal from subtask 5.3), 10) Responsive design using theme colors and proper constraints. Integrates with DestinationSearchProvider for search state and FilterProvider for filter management. Created screens barrel file for clean imports. Follows existing patterns from HomeScreen and ProfileScreen with proper _build method organization. Navigation and save functionality are placeholders (to be implemented in later subtasks).

subtasks.title: Create DestinationDetailScreen

subtasks.notes:

- Hero image gallery with swipeable images and indicator dots
- Destination name and description with hidden gem badge
- Prominent safety score display using SafetyScoreBadge widget
- Solo suitability score display using SoloSuitabilityBadge widget
- Safety insights section using SafetyInsights widget with expandable cards
- Popular activities list using ActivityList widget
- Best time to visit information card
- Budget level indicator in quick info chips
- Location info with country code and region
- Save/bookmark button with proper auth state checking and toggle functionality (checks if user is authenticated, toggles save/unsave)
- Add to trip button (placeholder for subtask 7.1)
- Related destinations section with horizontal scrolling using DestinationCard widgets
- Loading, error, and empty states with proper error handling and user-friendly messages
- Smooth animations with FadeTransition and PageController
- Pull-to-refresh functionality using RefreshIndicator
- Integration with DestinationDetailProvider and SavedDestinationsProvider
- Proper Riverpod AsyncValue pattern usage throughout

Note: Map location display shows country/region text. A full map widget could be added in future iterations if needed.

subtasks.title: Create FilterModal widget
subtasks.description: Modal or bottom sheet for advanced filtering options
subtasks.notes: Successfully implemented comprehensive FilterModal widget with all required features. Created ConsumerStatefulWidget with temporary filter state (applied only on Apply button press). Modal displays at 85% screen height with scrollable content. Includes: 1) Budget level selector with FilterChip widgets (Budget/Moderate/Luxury) with appropriate icons, 2) Safety score slider (1-10 range) with color-coded display (green ≥8, orange ≥6, red <6), 3) Solo suitability score slider (1-10 range) with person icon and primary theme color, 4) Activity level selector with FilterChip widgets (Relaxed/Moderate/Adventurous) with contextual icons, 5) Location/region section with TextField inputs for country code (auto-capitalized) and region, 6) Tags multi-select with 12 predefined categories (Beach, Mountain, Urban, Cultural, Adventure, Nature, Food, Wellness, Nightlife, Shopping, Historical, Romantic) using FilterChip widgets, 7) Hidden gems toggle with SwitchListTile and amber theming, 8) Sort order dropdown with DropdownButtonFormField showing 7 sort options (Popularity, Safety, Solo Suitability, Budget Low to High, Budget High to Low, Newest, Relevance) with icons, 9) Apply and Cancel buttons in bottom action bar with proper styling, 10) Clear All button shown conditionally when filters are active, 11) Active filter count displayed in header next to title, 12) Handle bar at top for visual indication of draggable modal. Private helper classes for each filter section: _BudgetLevelSection, _SafetyScoreSection, _SoloSuitabilitySection, _ActivityLevelSection, _LocationSection, _TagsSection, _HiddenGemsSection, _SortOrderSection. Integrated with FilterProvider for state management. Updated DestinationDiscoveryScreen to open FilterModal via showModalBottomSheet with transparent background and isScrollControlled: true. Added FilterModal export to widgets barrel file. All acceptance criteria met with proper Material Design 3 patterns and theme integration.
acceptance_criteria: Budget range selector - COMPLETED with FilterChip widgets
Safety score slider - COMPLETED with color-coded display (green/orange/red)
Activity level dropdown/chips - COMPLETED with FilterChip widgets
Solo suitability slider - COMPLETED with person icon
Location/region selector - COMPLETED with TextField inputs
Tags multi-select - COMPLETED with 12 predefined categories
Apply and reset buttons - COMPLETED in bottom action bar
Active filters display - COMPLETED with count in header
Clear all option - COMPLETED with Clear All button

subtasks.title: Create RecommendationsScreen
subtasks.description: Screen showing personalized recommendations
subtasks.notes: Successfully implemented comprehensive RecommendationsScreen with all required features. Created ConsumerStatefulWidget with proper authentication state checking using authNotifierProvider. Features include: 1) Personalized header with greeting, recommendation summary, destination count, and timestamp (using relative time formatting like '2 hours ago'), 2) Filter options via PopupMenuButton with three filters (All Recommendations, High Match Only ≥70%, Hidden Gems), 3) Recommended destinations displayed in sorted order by match score (highest first) using custom _RecommendationCard widget, 4) Match score displayed as percentage badge with color coding (green ≥80%, orange ≥60%, red <60%) and contextual icons (star/thumb_up/info_outline), 5) Recommendation reason shown with italic text explaining why the destination matches, 6) Matching factors displayed as chips (up to 4 visible) showing key factors like 'high solo suitability', 'cultural activities', 'moderate budget', 7) Hidden gem badge overlay for special recommendations with diamond icon and amber color, 8) Safety and solo suitability scores displayed using SafetyScoreBadge and SoloSuitabilityBadge widgets, 9) Save/bookmark functionality with auth state checking and toggle save/unsave to wishlist, 10) Pull-to-refresh using RefreshIndicator with error handling, 11) Empty state with contextual messages based on selected filter, helpful icon, and refresh button, 12) Loading state with CircularProgressIndicator, 13) Error state with error message and 'Try Again' button, 14) Sign-in prompt state for unauthenticated users with call-to-action button, 15) Proper authentication flow checking user is signed in before showing recommendations, 16) Integration with RecommendationProvider and SavedDestinationsProvider. Custom _RecommendationCard widget shows comprehensive recommendation data with match score badge, hidden gem indicator, reason text, matching factors chips, scores, and bookmark button. Added RecommendationFilter enum for filtering options. Updated screens barrel file to export RecommendationsScreen. All acceptance criteria met with proper Material Design 3 patterns and theme integration.
